headline: How The Verisk Analytics (VRSK) Narrative Is Shifting On Growth, AI Risk And Valuation
summary: Verisk Analytics has seen model fair value shift from US$221.53 to US$222.53, a very small move that still catches attention given recent debates around where the stock should trade. Analysts have been adjusting their price targets both higher and lower, reflecting optimism about Verisk's core insurance data franchise alongside caution about growth drivers, AI risk, and execution against guidance. As you read on, you will see how to track these changing views and what to watch as the story...
